function.name: format_date
function.description: Format a date string to a different format.
function.long_description: Parses a date string using an input format and returns a reformatted date string in the requested output format.
example_user_queries: Call format_date with date 2024-01-01 and output format %B %d, %Y.
Convert date string to long format using format_date.
Execute format_date on 01/09/2026 using input %d/%m/%Y and output %Y-%m-%d.
Format 2026-11-01 to weekday and month name.
Give me a human-readable date for 2026-10-20.
